name: Mashed Aubergines (Nam Prik Makhua Yao)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the outer skin off the shallots and place them with the unpeeled aubergines, garlic cloves, and chili under a hot grill or over a barbecue until browned.
2. Peel the aubergines and garlic.
3. Pound the chili, shallots, and garlic together. Add the salt and aubergine; pound again.
4. Fry the pounded mixture in vegetable oil for 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Cut the hard-boiled eggs into wedge shapes and mix with other ingredients or serve separately.
6. Sprinkle mint leaves over the aubergine and serve with vegetables.
